interactions.summary: Do you not think that if his son decided to run and then announced that the vice president was his dad, do you not think that there would be such a huge backlash in the United States that his son wouldn't win? Well, I think there's a possibility that they figure out how to cheat in 2028. Oh, as in actually cheat at the election? Right. At the poll booth. Right. So let's go into Trump's mind. All right? His psychology...
